# hetzner_ssh_keys (Data Source)

Use this data source to list all SSH keys in the Hetzner Robot account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hetzner_ssh_keys" "all" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `ssh_keys` (Attributes List) List of SSH keys. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ssh_keys))

<a id="nestedatt--ssh_keys"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ssh_keys`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) Creation date.
- `data` (String) Public key in OpenSSH format.
- `fingerprint` (String) Fingerprint of the SSH key.
- `name` (String) Name of the SSH key.
- `size` (Number) Key size in bits.
- `type` (String) Algorithm type.
